creator: daimler3@gmail.com
text:
Dolphin does not (always) show correct disk space information.

for example my /usr partition is 32 GB large, but 
Dolphin says:
13,7 GiB free of 253,5 GiB (95% used)

df says:
1.7G free of 32G (94% used)

How-To-Repeat: 1.) Start a Dolphin
2.) Look at the properties of any partition.
